teams.name: Nightly Code Bug Hunter
teams.description: Monitor Prometheus codebase for runtime errors, broken integrations, and code quality regressions. Nightly automated scans: scanner finds errors → triager filters and verifies impact → verifier confirms critical bugs and recommends fixes. Goal: catch bugs before they affect production or user sessions.

manager.systemPrompt: Coordinate the Nightly Code Bug Hunter team. Purpose: Monitor Prometheus codebase for runtime errors, broken integrations, and code quality regressions. Nightly automated scans: scanner finds errors → triager filters and verifies impact → verifier confirms critical bugs and recommends fixes. Goal: catch bugs before they affect production or user sessions.
